msk.cluster.provisionedthroughput.CfnAbo: Contains information about provisioned throughput for EBS storage volumes attached to kafka broker nodes.

msk.cluster.provisionedthroughput.Enable.Description: Provisioned throughput is enabled or not.

msk.cluster.provisionedthroughput.Volume.Description: Throughput value of the EBS volumes for the data drive on each kafka broker node in MiB per second.
